top_signals.title: EasyJet Hits Highest Since 2022 After Latest Castlelake Bid
top_signals.summary: EasyJet Plc agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from Castlelake LP, which swooped in as the UK budget carrier was reeling from soaring jet fuel prices and suppressed demand after the Iran war. The announcement sent shares soaring more than 11% on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Glut Fears Rise as Supply Recovery Outpaces Demand | Insight with Haslinda Amin 07/06/2026
top_signals.summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Experimental Ebola trial begins in Congo as death toll tops 500
top_signals.summary: The World Health Organization-sponsored trial will test the monoclonal antibody cocktail MBP134 and the antiviral remdesivir alongside optimized supportive care.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
